reviews.comment:
Mala la atención de los playeros, si estas apurado ni pases. Baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are terrible; if you're in a hurry, don't even bother. The restrooms are clean.

reviews.comment:
Principalmente los baños siempre limpios y con olor rico. Venden de todo y muy buena atención!

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are always clean and smell great. They sell everything and the service is excellent!

reviews.comment:

Excellent stop on your way to Patagonia. Fill up with gas if you're going to Playas Doradas.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, mejor precios  baños limpios y lugar para descansar

(Translated by Google)
Good service, great prices, clean bathrooms, and a place to relax.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGRVpUSktlVlYwYldWcFQwaFZkMlI2TVVOeVluYxAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar ideal para parar a almorzar y descansar! La atención del personal y los productos ofrecidos, todo de primera!!! Además, sumamente cordiales los chicos de la playa de carga de combustible y de atención en el bar! Baños súper limpios!!!☺️

(Translated by Google)
Perfect place to stop for lunch and relax! The staff and the products offered are top-notch!!! Plus, the guys at the gas station and the bar were incredibly friendly! Spotlessly clean restrooms!!! ☺️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wemNXMVJUbWRPV0VwcFdEVjBNbXQxVlRoUmRuYxAB

reviews.comment:
